prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等工科专业高热推荐，临床医学推荐，生化环 材一般观望；本省2026年考生总数约120万（较2025年约90万大幅增加），按历史比例估算物理类约73.4万人，竞争显著加剧；云南大学位于云南省，距河南省较远，跨省报考存在地域偏好影响；该校在河南招生计划近年持续增加，体现对河南生源的重视。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the science group (including science/physics category) were approximately 25942 → 24529 → 38365 → 25762 → 64425, with an abnormal large drop in 2023 (38365) and a significant drop to 64425 in 2025 due to the new college entrance examination reform (physics category), showing drastic fluctuations; the 2025 baseline is approximately 64425; the university's enrollment plan in Henan for the science group: 48 in 2021, 53 in 2022, 52 in 2023, 73 in 2024, and 92 in 2025 (physics category); the 2026 plan is 131, an increase of about 42.4% compared to 2025, a significant expansion that notably alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 71st in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a steady rise in recent years and continuously enhanced comprehensive strength; the 2025 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (employment data issues have attracted attention); Douyin popularity in 2024 was high, and in 2026 the overall ranking is 62nd (average), with moderate overall attention; no obvious record of enrollment gaps; Ethnology A+, Ecology A, Statistics A-; Statistics is directly related to majors in the physics category such as Data Science and Big Data Technology, Statistics; Ecology is related to majors such as Environmental Science and Engineering, Ecology.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly recommended, Clinical Medicine is recommended, and Chemistry, Biology, Materials, Environmental Science are generally wait-and-see; the total number of examinees in the province in 2026 is about 1.2 million (significantly increased from about 900,000 in 2025), with an estimated physics category of about 734,000 based on historical proportions, significantly intensifying competition; Yunnan University is located in Yunnan Province, far from Henan Province, with cross-province applications subject to regional preference effects; the university's enrollment plan in Henan has been increasing in recent years, reflecting its emphasis on Henan students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the baseline of a significant ranking drop after the 2025 new college entrance examination reform, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 42.4% which significantly pushes back rankings, the substantial increase in the total number of examinees in the province intensifying competition, and the continuously rising university ranking enhancing attractiveness, based on the 2025 baseline of 64425, the predicted 2026 minimum ranking is approximately 80714, with a range of 80214–81214.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 80214–81214, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 80214), prioritize popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Statistics; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 81214), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 3 majors such as Chemistry, Environmental Science, and Business Administration to ensure admission.

The university's enrollment plan in Henan Province for the liberal arts group: 23 in 2021, 20 in 2022, 21 in 2023, 44 in 2024, and 26 in 2025 (history category); the 2026 plan is 34, an increase of about 30.8% compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion that alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; in 2026, it ranks approximately 71st in the Soft Science China University Rankings, steadily rising from 83rd in recent years, indicating continuous improvement in comprehensive strength; the 2025 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (data on employment rates from the College of Life Sciences has drawn attention); Douyin popularity was high in 2024 (11th place), and in 2026 it ranks 62nd overall (average), with overall attention at a medium-to-high level; no significant admission gaps have been recorded; Ethnology is A+ (top in the country), Ecology is A, and Statistics is A-, totaling 3 disciplines at A- or above; Ethnology is directly related to admission majors such as Ethnology and Sociology, while Statistics is related to majors like Data Science and Statistics.

专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly recommended, Law is divided with a wait-and-see attitude, and Journalism/Communication is clearly discouraged; the total number of examinees in the province in 2026 is about 1.2 million (a significant increase from about 900,000 in 2025), with an estimated history category of about 466,000 based on historical proportions, leading to intensified competition; Yunnan University is located in Yunnan Province, far from Henan Province, so cross-province applications are influenced by regional preferences; the university's enrollment proportion in its own province (Yunnan) is much higher than in other provinces, and Henan candidates need to consider geographical distance when applying.

预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings, the approximately 30.8% expansion in 2026 which pushes rankings further back, the significant increase in the total number of examinees in the province intensifying competition, and the steady rise in the university's ranking enhancing its appeal, based on the 2025 baseline of 6178, the estimated minimum ranking for 2026 is about 7269, with a range of 6769–7769.
